notes.authentication: No authentication required for local instance. Optional for remote deployments
notes.pricing: Free and open-source. No API costs - only hardware costs
notes.streaming: All models support streaming responses via REST API
notes.rate_limits: No rate limits - limited only by your hardware
notes.local_inference: Models run entirely on your local machine - no data sent to cloud
notes.model_library: Large library of pre-built models with automatic quantization
notes.hardware_requirements: CPU or GPU support. Recommended: 8GB+ RAM for 7B models, 16GB+ for 13B, 32GB+ for 70B
notes.quantization: Models available in Q4_0, Q4_K_M, Q5_K_M, Q8_0 and other formats
notes.gpu_acceleration: Automatic GPU detection and usage (NVIDIA CUDA, Apple Metal, AMD ROCm)
notes.rest_api: RESTful API compatible with OpenAI format
notes.cli: Simple command-line interface for chat and model management
notes.open_source: All models are open-source. No proprietary models available
notes.privacy: Complete data privacy - everything runs locally
notes.no_internet: Run models offline after initial download
notes.model_size: Models range from 1B to 405B parameters with various quantization levels
notes.concurrency: Single model instance per session. Multiple concurrent requests queue

hardware_requirements.cpu: Works on CPU with sufficient RAM

models.name: nomic-embed-text
models.description: Nomic Embed Text v1.5 for embeddings

pull.description: Download a model from the library

modelfile.example:
FROM llama3.3
PARAMETER temperature 0.7
SYSTEM You are a helpful assistant.

cpu.fallback: Automatically used if no GPU detected
cpu.performance: Slower than GPU but works on any system

continue.description: VS Code extension for coding with Ollama

server.setup: Install Ollama on server and expose port 11434

best_practices.model_selection: Start with smaller models (7B-13B) for testing, scale up as needed
best_practices.quantization: Use Q4_K_M for best quality/size balance, Q8_0 for maximum quality
best_practices.hardware: GPU acceleration highly recommended for models >7B
best_practices.memory: Ensure sufficient RAM/VRAM before downloading large models
best_practices.storage: Models can be large (1GB-231GB) - ensure sufficient disk space
best_practices.networking: Initial download requires internet - models cached locally after
best_practices.updates: Regularly update Ollama for latest features and model support
best_practices.custom_models: Use Modelfile to create custom configurations and prompts
best_practices.monitoring: Use 'ollama ps' to monitor running models and resource usage
best_practices.cleanup: Remove unused models with 'ollama rm' to free space
best_practices.concurrent: Run one model at a time for best performance
best_practices.temperature: Adjust temperature parameter for creativity vs consistency

limitations.no_proprietary: No access to proprietary models (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini Pro)
limitations.storage: Requires significant disk space for model storage
limitations.single_instance: Typically runs one model at a time
limitations.no_cloud_features: No built-in fine-tuning, no cloud scaling
limitations.download_required: Models must be downloaded before use

advantages.privacy: Complete data privacy - everything runs locally
advantages.cost: Free to use - no API costs
advantages.offline: Works without internet after initial download
advantages.no_rate_limits: No rate limiting - limited only by hardware
advantages.customization: Full control over models and configuration
advantages.portable: Run same models across different machines

recommended.gpu: NVIDIA GPU with 8GB+ VRAM or Apple Silicon

getting_started.step_2: Pull a model: ollama pull llama3.2
getting_started.step_3: Run the model: ollama run llama3.2
getting_started.step_4: Start chatting or use the API
